settings.editor: If you are running ads to your Shopify store, between 40-60% of purchases will no longer display in Facebook ads manager. This means for every 10 sales you generate, roughly only 5 of them will track back to the ad they came from. The other 5 sales are not reported at all inside your ads manager.

If you are running ads to your Shopify store, between 40-60% of purchases will no longer display in Facebook ads manager. This means for every 10 sales you generate, roughly only 5 of them will track back to the ad they came from. The other 5 sales are not reported at all inside your ads manager.
